summary: Seven-day sales show steady demand on two core SKUs. Inventory is trending low on the top seller, and one slow mover may benefit from a limited promotional discount.
insights: SKU-DEMO-001 accounts for 42% of weekly revenue.
Order volume increased 12% versus the prior seven-day period.
SKU-DEMO-014 has elevated stock with no sales in the last fourteen days.

recommendations.title: Restock: SKU-DEMO-001
recommendations.description: Reorder the top-selling SKU before projected stockout.
recommendations.rationale: On-hand units are below the seven-day sales velocity threshold. Restocking reduces lost-revenue risk using aggregate sales signals only.

recommendations.title: Consider discount: SKU-DEMO-014
recommendations.description: A modest promotional discount may accelerate clearance of slow-moving inventory.
recommendations.rationale: No recent sales despite available stock. A controlled discount is lower urgency than the restock need on the top SKU.
